## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Siit to discuss content strategy, publishing updates, and recent performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong week for Siit with 13 demo requests/inbound trials; website traffic increasing](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Content publishing delayed due to staff changes; some quality issues identified in recent tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Reddit marketing showing positive results with 2 demos attributed to Reddit exposure](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Carmel out for wedding next week; Shalom to handle approvals in her absence](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Workflow Adjustments

  - [Jess has left; Becerra taking on more responsibilities behind the scenes](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Jakub and Carmel primary points of contact for now](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Potential new hires in final interviews to address increased client demand](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Becerra handling more content creation and publishing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Siit Performance Update

  - [13 demo requests/inbound trials last week (mix)](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Website traffic increasing across all pages](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Tools pages performing well](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Positive activity from relevant leads observed via Snitcher](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### Content Publishing and Quality Issues

  - [Publishing delayed due to publisher being on vacation](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [5 tool pages to be published by end of tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Quality issues identified in recently published tool pages:](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [Linear icon missing border](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Oversized titles in tool comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [Incorrect categorization (e.g., collaboration tools mislabeled)](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [Some minor URL/linking errors](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Jakub acknowledging need for improved quality control and review processes](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Marketing Channels and Attribution

      - [Paid post planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [G2 Crowd review initiative to start upon Carmel's return](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Snitcher providing some insight into user interests and intent](https://fathom.video/share/Tq8HhaaxofPc2YRLXX8yPBtKktMzpxya?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
